title: Filter image only when necessary
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

reduces overhead in creating images.

#### How to verify it

no functional changes; existing tests should cover it.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

LGTM
But all kinds of unhappy tests and an update is needed @hanwen-flow

> But all kinds of unhappy tests

https://download.copr.fedorainfracloud.org/results/packit/containers-buildah-6141/centos-stream-10-aarch64/08977696-buildah/builder-live.log.gz

```
... ldah ./cmd/buildah
WORK=/tmp/go-build772404332
go: go.mod requires go >= 1.23.3 (running go 1.23.1; GOTOOLCHAIN=local)
error: Bad exit status from /var/tmp/rpm-tmp.zusnkA (%build)
```

Your code has overtaken your CI. This is unrelated to my change, and probably introduced by 365ad53dfc34741724baf36083b87cb68ec2dd9d .

@nalind
I think we should ignore rpm build failures are they are unrelated to this change

tide says "— Not mergeable. Needs lgtm label."

someone needs to give a (second?) magic LGTM command here.
